testcase.name: Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth with valid credentials returns token @smoke
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth token format is alphanumeric @smoke
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth response contains only token field
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth with missing username returns error @regression
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth with missing password returns error @regression
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth with invalid username returns error @regression
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth with invalid password returns error @regression
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth with both empty credentials returns error @regression
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth with whitespace-only username returns error @regression
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth with whitespace-only password returns error @regression
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth with special characters in username @regression
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth with SQL injection attempt in username returns error @security
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth with very long username @edge-case
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth with very long password @edge-case
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth with unicode characters in username @edge-case
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth with numeric string credentials @edge-case
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth case sensitivity - lowercase username @regression
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth case sensitivity - different password case @regression
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth returns consistent token on multiple calls @regression
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth has proper Content-Type header in response @smoke
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth with extra fields in payload @regression
Auth API - CreateToken @auth › POST /auth responds within acceptable time @performance

testcase.failure:
[api] › booking-delete.spec.ts:311:7 › Booking API - DeleteBooking @booking › DELETE /booking/:id with hexadecimal ID @edge-case
Error: expect(received).toContain(expected) // indexOf
Expected value: 201 Received array: [400, 404, 405, 500]
318 | const deleteResponse = await bookingClient.delete('0x1A', token); 319 | > 320 | expect([400, 404, 405, 500]).toContain(deleteResponse.status); | ^ 321 | }); 322 | 323 | test('DELETE /booking/:id twice on same booking fails second time @regression', async ({ bookingClient, authClient }) => { at /Users/vinayakm/Documents/TestVagrantWorkspace/Api/tests/booking-delete.spec.ts:320:34
Error Context: ../test-results/booking-delete-Booking-API-2ee3d-th-hexadecimal-ID-edge-case-api/error-context.md

npx playwright show-trace ../test-results/booking-delete-Booking-API-2ee3d-th-hexadecimal-ID-edge-case-api/trace.zip
